title: Airbnb Q2 2024 Financial Results
text: Airbnb reported Q2 2024 results with revenue increased 11 percent year-over-year to $2.75 billion. This was 0.66% better than the analyst estimate for revenue of $2.73 billion. Airbnb reported earnings per share of 86 cents, which was below the analyst estimate for EPS of 90 cents. In Q2 2024, Airbnb delivered a net income margin of 20%, down from 26% in Q2 2023. Net income was $555 million, representing a net income margin of 20 percent. Q2 Adjusted EBITDA was $894 million, up 9% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA of $894 million increased 9 percent year-over-year and represented an Adjusted EBITDA Margin of 33 percent. Q2 Free Cash Flow was $1.0 billion, up 16% year-over-year. The company generated $4.3 billion of FCF over the trailing twelve months. The growth marks a step down from the 18% surge seen in Q2 2023, signaling a shift from the heady days of rapid post-pandemic expansion to a more stabilized, mature market environment. In Q2 2024, Airbnb surpassed 8 million active listings. Nights and Experiences Booked were 125.1 million, up 9% on a year-over-year basis.
